title: Troubleshooting kubeadm — kubeadm upgrade planprints outcontext deadline exceedederror message
text:
This error message is shown when upgrading a Kubernetes cluster with
kubeadm
in
the case of running an external etcd. This is not a critical bug and happens because
older versions of kubeadm perform a version check on the external etcd cluster.
You can proceed with
kubeadm upgrade apply ...
.
This issue is fixed as of version 1.19.
